arts.ttl: Sources: West Ham in talks with OM over Wahi
arts.sum: West Ham United are in active talks with Marseille for the potential transfer of striker Elye Wahi, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: USMNT Transfers: Ricardo Pepi and Antonee Robinson sagas continue, John Tolkin due for step up and more
arts.sum: It seems like it may not be the busiest transfer window at the top level, but there are still several moves on the cards that could alter the USMNT At the moment, it appears Ricardo Pepi and Antonee Robinson, the two players most linked with moves, might just be staying, but that doesn't mean there aren't some other less-heralded moves to be made that could shake up the USMNT over the next year and a half leading up to the World Cup.

arts.ttl: Potter includes Emerson, Rodríguez and Soler for Fulham derby
arts.sum: Subs: Foderingham (GK), Coufal, Cresswell, Scarles, Casey, Orford, Irving, Luis Guilherme, Ings West Ham United: Fabiański, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Kilman, Emerson, Rodríguez, Álvarez, Souček ©, Soler, Kudus, Paquetá

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Fulham team news LIVE! Potter set for PL Hammers bow
arts.sum: “We scored a good goal from Rodrigo, it was a good finish from him,” Silva said when asked about Muniz’s first-time finish into the bottom right corner. Marco Silva is relishing the competition between Fulham’s striking options after Rodrigo Muniz and Raul Jimenez got among the goals in their 4-1 victory over Watford in the third round of the FA Cup at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: West Ham hold ‘initial intensive discussions’ about transfer – Club won’t stand in the way
arts.sum: West Ham United have held ‘initial intensive talks’ with RB Leipzig regarding a deal for striker André Silva. That’s according to BILD, who report that Leipzig will not stand in the way of any transfer for the Portuguese striker this month. A report in England had claimed Silva was a ‘hot candidate’ for a loan The post West Ham hold ‘initial intensive discussions’ about transfer – Club won’t stand in the way appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'I didn't want to get out of bed' - West Ham's Gorry
arts.sum: Katrina Gorry discusses her four-year battle with an eating disorder and how she hopes to create a more open environment for discussing body image.

arts.ttl: “Hugely important” | Hammers need to step up chase for striker
arts.sum: According to media reports, MLS side Atlanta United are said to have submitted a bid of around £16.4 million for Middlesbrough striker Emmanuel Latte Lath who has previously been linked with a move to West Ham. Should Atlanta’s bid be accepted by the Championship side, it would become the most expensive transfer fee paid by...
